_note: Source of truth for `main` branch protection. Apply with scripts/apply-branch-protection.sh arpitarya fux main. The required `fux gate` check + required PR review + enforce_admins together mean NO direct commits to `main` by anyone (incl. admins) — every change goes via a new branch + PR. enforce_admins MUST stay true; setting it false is a real weakening of the wall (see docs/constitution-enforcement-handoff.md §2f).
